proposal.working_title: AI Sales Email Automation: How B2B Teams Replace 4 Hours of Manual Outreach a Day
proposal.one_line_angle: B2B reps lose half their day to copy-paste outreach. Here is the AI sales email automation stack that puts that time back in the pipeline.
outline_bullets: Why generic AI email drafts feel robotic and how operator-grade automation fixes the signal
The four data sources every AI sales email tool needs (CRM, intent, technographic, conversation history)
Building the playbook: trigger logic, copy variants, deliverability guardrails, and feedback loops that actually compound
